1. Primary Request and Intent:
   The user's primary explicit request from the prior session was "option a use this code and plug my neon db in the backend or whatever" — meaning to implement a comprehensive reference architecture for the OmegA Vercel app using custom React hooks, modular components, and Neon PostgreSQL database integration. In the current session, the user invoked the Neon Postgres skill for database guidance, then requested creation of a CLAUDE.md file (via /init command) to document the codebase architecture and development patterns for future Claude Code instances working on this repository.

2. Key Technical Concepts:
   - Next.js 16.2.1 with App Router and Turbopack bundler
   - React 19 with TypeScript 5 (strict mode)
   - Custom React hooks for encapsulated state management (useOmegaChat, useVoiceEngine, useIsMobile)
   - Component composition pattern with 3-column responsive layout
   - Streaming chat responses via ReadableStream and AbortController
   - Web Speech API wrapper for voice-to-text transcription
   - Neon PostgreSQL serverless database for persistence
   - Tailwind CSS for responsive design (768px mobile breakpoint)
   - Bearer token authentication to backend API gateway
   - State machines for system state and voice state management
   - Modal overlays with z-layer management
   - Responsive collapsing UI for mobile vs desktop

3. Files and Code Sections:
   - `/home/mega/OMEGA_WORKSPACE/CODE/omega-web/omega-web/src/app/page.tsx`
     - The main orchestration component (Index) that wires all hooks and components together
     - Manages four modal states: settingsOpen, stateDrawerOpen, sidebarOpen, telemetryOpen
     - Implements lifecycle effect for auto-sending voice transcripts as messages
     - Renders the 3-column layout with proper responsive collapsing
     - Critical importance: This is the integration point that connects all components and hooks

   - `/home/mega/OMEGA_WORKSPACE/CODE/omega-web/omega-web/src/hooks/useOmegaChat.ts`
     - Core chat state management hook managing conversations, messages, systemState, streaming
     - Integrates with /api/chat (streaming), /api/sessions (management), /api/messages (history)
     - Uses AbortController for cancellation and ReadableStream for real-time message handling
     - Methods: sendMessage, createConversation, switchConversation, deleteConversation, retry, clearError

   - `/home/mega/OMEGA_WORKSPACE/CODE/omega-web/omega-web/src/hooks/useVoiceEngine.ts`
     - Web Speech API wrapper managing voiceState, transcript, interimTranscript, isListening

     - Settings: language, volume (0-1), interruptible (boolean)
     - Methods: startListening, stopListening, exitVoiceMode, interruptSpeech, updateSettings

   - `/home/mega/OMEGA_WORKSPACE/CODE/omega-web/omega-web/src/hooks/useIsMobile.ts`
     - Simple responsive detection returning boolean isMobile at 768px breakpoint

   - `/home/mega/OMEGA_WORKSPACE/CODE/omega-web/omega-web/src/components/omega/` (10 components)
     - OmegaHeader.tsx: Top header with menu and settings buttons
     - ChatView.tsx: Message display area with auto-scroll and thinking indicator
     - ChatComposer.tsx: Text input with voice button and transcript display
     - ConversationSidebar.tsx: Left sidebar with conversation list and new chat button
     - TelemetryPanel.tsx: Right sidebar showing system state and streaming status
     - VoiceMode.tsx: Full-screen modal during voice interaction with animated orb
     - SettingsModal.tsx: Settings dialog with language, volume, interruptible options
     - SystemStateDrawer.tsx: Right-side debug drawer showing JSON system state
     - OmegaMessage.tsx: Individual message display with role-based styling
     - ActionSheet.tsx: Bottom sheet menu with destructive action styling

   - `/home/mega/OMEGA_WORKSPACE/CODE/omega-web/omega-web/src/lib/api.ts`
     - API client utilities with typed request/response interfaces

#!/usr/bin/env python3
# -*- coding: utf-8 -*-
"""Push  dossier additions to family_profiles DB."""
import psycopg2
import json

DATABASE_URL = "postgresql://neondb_owner:npg_HbW1Zlkjd7NI@ep-sweet-glade-anvm0pwn-pooler.c-6.us-east-1.aws.neon.tech/neondb?sslmode=require"

updates = [
    {
        "name": "Justin",
        "last_name": "Schwartz",
        "fun_facts": json.dumps([
            "Avid fisherman",
            "Expert custom lure maker - makes his own hand-crafted lures",
            "During RY's 2022 visit he showed off his lure collection - a memorable shared moment",
            "Quiet and easygoing - the Pennsylvania version of a good ole boy"
        ]),
        "how_to_greet": "Hey Jay! Still out on the water? RY always remembers those lures you made.",
        "ry_notes": "Jay is Lauren's partner and Deacon's dad. Works industrial/warehouse maintenance. Classic good ole boy - loves fishing and is a serious custom lure maker. RY connected with him over that during the 2022 PA visit.",
        "notes_for_omega": None,
    },
    {
        "name": "Suzanne",
        "last_name": "Muldoon",
        "fun_facts": json.dumps([
            "Licensed Professional Counselor (LPC), now retired",
            "One of the family 'party girls' alongside Trenda - has lived a wild and storied life",
            "Sister of Robo Hamilton; mother of Lauren (Alye)",
            "Now taking it easy in retirement in Pennsylvania"
        ]),
        "how_to_greet": "Hey Suszie! How's retirement treating you?",
        "ry_notes": "Suzanne is RY's paternal aunt - Robo's sister, Lauren's mom. She's an LPC but also known as one of the family party girls along with Trenda. Now retired. Academic and empathetic but not uptight about it.",
        "notes_for_omega": None,
    },
    {
        "name": "Adam",
        "last_name": "Goodner",
        "fun_facts": json.dumps([
            "Big deer hunter - known for trophy bucks",
            "Older sister Holly who moved to New Zealand",
            "Son of Phyllis Diane Goodner (deceased 2021)",
            "Carpenter/handyman working in Mt. Ida",
            "Quiet, community-oriented country boy"
        ]),
        "how_to_greet": "Hey Adam! Any bucks on the wall lately?",
        "ry_notes": "Adam is Kendra's partner and baby William's dad. Classic quiet country boy - big hunter known for trophy bucks. His sister Holly moved to New Zealand. Mom Phyllis passed in 2021.",
        "notes_for_omega": None,
    },
    {
        "name": "Trenda",
        "last_name": "Drury",
        "fun_facts": json.dumps([
            "One of the family 'party girls' alongside Suzanne Muldoon - has lived a wild and storied life",
            "Works Guest Care at Mt. Harbor Resort alongside her daughter Kendra",
            "Very close to the core Story family",
            "Sister of Teresa Yett and Bobby Yett Jr."
        ]),
        "how_to_greet": "Hey Aunt Trenda! Working with Kendra over at Mt. Harbor these days?",
        "ry_notes": "Trenda is RY's maternal aunt. She and Kendra both work at Mt. Harbor Resort - they are literally coworkers. She and Suzanne Muldoon share the family 'party girl' archetype. Michael Drury is her estranged ex - NEVER mention him to her.",
        "notes_for_omega": "DO NOT mention Michael Drury in any conversation with or about Trenda. He is expelled/estranged and incarcerated. She works alongside Kendra at Mt. Harbor Resort.",
    },
    {
        "name": "Travis",
        "last_name": "Beechy",
        "fun_facts": json.dumps([
            "Local turkey hunting legend - has bagged impressive game",
            "Three younger brothers: Dakota, Dusty, and Dalton",
            "Carpenter/handyman in Mt. Ida area",
            "Quiet, dependable country boy - exceptional outdoorsman",
            "Lives in Robo Hamilton's old house with Jada in Story, AR"
        ]),
        "how_to_greet": "Hey Travis! Turkey season coming up?",
        "ry_notes": "Travis is Jada's husband - RY's brother-in-law. Quiet country boy, exceptional outdoorsman, legendary turkey hunter. Has 3 brothers: Dakota, Dusty, Dalton. Carpenter by trade. Lives in Robo's old house.",
        "notes_for_omega": None,
    },
]

conn = psycopg2.connect(DATABASE_URL)
cur = conn.cursor()

for u in updates:
    cur.execute("""
        UPDATE family_profiles
        SET
            fun_facts = %s::jsonb,
            how_to_greet = %s,
            ry_notes = %s,
            notes_for_omega = CASE WHEN %s IS NOT NULL THEN %s ELSE notes_for_omega END
        WHERE name = %s AND last_name = %s
    """, (
        u["fun_facts"],
        u["how_to_greet"],
        u["ry_notes"],
        u.get("notes_for_omega"),
        u.get("notes_for_omega"),
        u["name"],
        u["last_name"],
    ))
    print(f"Updated {u['name']} {u['last_name']}: {cur.rowcount} row(s)")

conn.commit()
cur.close()
conn.close()
print("Done.")
